instruction:
You are an Expert DevOps Engineer specializing in Travis CI to GitHub Actions migrations. Migrate this Travis CI config to a COMPLETE GitHub Actions workflow.

OUTPUT RULES
- Output YAML only (no prose). Your output MUST start with "name:" and include top-level keys: name, on, jobs.
- Include at least one job with: runs-on, steps.
- Do NOT output a snippet (must not start with "- uses:" or "- run:").

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map Travis lifecycle to GHA steps: before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy.
- Map matrices: jdk/node_js/python/go -> strategy.matrix; allow_failures -> continue-on-error.
- Env: env.global -> env (workflow/job/step). $FOO secrets -> ${{ secrets.FOO }}.
- Caches: cache: directories -> actions/cache@v4 with stable keys.
- Services/addons: services (dbs) -> jobs.<job>.services; addons.apt -> apt-get steps.
- Docker/Compose: preserve docker build/push and docker-compose up/down; keep wait loops verbatim.
- Triggers: preserve original branch/tag names; do not invent "main" or "master".
- Use modern actions: actions/checkout@v4; actions/setup-java@v4 (distribution: temurin), setup-node@v4, setup-python@v5, setup-go@v5.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source (Buildx, login actions, GHCR, Sonar, custom email actions). If no 1:1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:" comment.
- Prefer compact flow style for simple event lists. Use on: [push, pull_request] instead of multiline empty mappings.
- Do not leave empty event mappings.
- If branch/tag filters are required, switch to the expanded form for that event only.


Now migrate below input section Travis CI configuration to equivalent complete GitHub Actions workflow and return ONLY the complete migrated YAML maintaining the above OUTPUT and CONVERSION rules.
input:
language: java

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: build
      if: branch != master OR type IN (pull_request)
      jdk: oraclejdk9
      script:
        - mvn clean verify
    - stage: build
      if: branch != master OR type IN (pull_request)
      jdk: oraclejdk8
      script:
        - mvn clean verify
    - stage: build
      if: branch = master AND type IN (push)
      jdk: oraclejdk9
      script:
        - mvn clean verify
    - stage: build
      if: branch = master AND type IN (push) AND repo = bootique/bootique-logback
      jdk: oraclejdk8
      script:
        - mvn clean source:jar javadoc:javadoc deploy --settings travis_settings.xml
    - stage: build
      if: branch = master AND type IN (push) AND repo != bootique/bootique-logback
      jdk: oraclejdk8
      script:
        - mvn clean verify

env:
  global:
    - secure: ""
    - secure: ""
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build_nonmaster_jdk9:
    if: github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 9
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '9'
    - name: Build
      run: mvn clean verify

  build_nonmaster_jdk8:
    if: github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Build
      run: mvn clean verify

  build_master_push_jdk9:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 9
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '9'
    - name: Build
      run: mvn clean verify

  deploy_master_repo_specific_jdk8:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push' && github.repository == 'bootique/bootique-logback'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Deploy
      run: mvn clean source:jar javadoc:javadoc deploy --settings travis_settings.xml

  build_master_push_other_repo_jdk8:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push' && github.repository != 'bootique/bootique-logback'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Build
      run: mvn clean verify

env:
  global:
    - CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID=430594ee361ff2e93ebf0a942f639b8092c6f17b7c5098f9c75abc404311dfc7
language: java
dist: xenial
jdk:
- openjdk8
- openjdk9
before_script:
  - curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
  - chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
  - ./cc-test-reporter before-build
script:
  - ./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport
after_script:
  - JACOCO_SOURCE_PATH=src/main/java ./cc-test-reporter format-coverage ./build/reports/jacoco/test/jacocoTestReport.xml --input-type jacoco
  - ./cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -r $CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID
notifications:
  slack:
    secure: 
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID: 430594ee361ff2e93ebf0a942f639b8092c6f17b7c5098f9c75abc404311dfc7

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '9']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Download CodeClimate test reporter
        run: |
          curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
          chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
      - name: CodeClimate before-build
        run: ./cc-test-reporter before-build
      - name: Build and test
        run: ./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport
      - name: Format coverage report
        run: JACOCO_SOURCE_PATH=src/main/java ./cc-test-reporter format-coverage ./build/reports/jacoco/test/jacocoTestReport.xml --input-type jacoco
      - name: Upload coverage to CodeClimate
        run: ./cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -r $CC_TEST_REPORTER_ID
      - name: Slack notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          # TODO: Configure Slack notifications using webhook

input:
language: java
jdk: openjdk8
before_install:
- openssl aes-256-cbc -K $encrypted_7d07226627da_key -iv $encrypted_7d07226627da_iv
  -in firebase/firebase-sdk-key.json.enc -out firebase/firebase-sdk-key.json -d
- curl -sL https://firebase.tools | bash
script: firebase emulators:exec --only auth --project turma-de-elite-app './gradlew
  test'
deploy:
  provider: heroku
  skip_cleanup: true
  strategy: git
  api_key:
    secure: 
  app: turma-de-elite
  on:
    branch: release
    condition: release
before_cache:
- rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
- rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  npm: true
  directories:
  - "$HOME/.cache/firebase"
  - "$HOME/.gradle/caches/"
  - "$HOME/.gradle/wrapper/"
env:
  global:
  - secure: 
  - secure: 
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  SECRET_1: 
  SECRET_2: 

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Cache Firebase
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/firebase
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-firebase-${{ hashFiles('**/firebase.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-firebase-
      - name: Decrypt Firebase SDK key
        run: openssl aes-256-cbc -K $encrypted_7d07226627da_key -iv $encrypted_7d07226627da_iv -in firebase/firebase-sdk-key.json.enc -out firebase/firebase-sdk-key.json -d
      - name: Install Firebase CLI
        run: curl -sL https://firebase.tools | bash
      - name: Run tests with Firebase emulators
        run: firebase emulators:exec --only auth --project turma-de-elite-app './gradlew test'
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
      - name: Deploy to Heroku
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/release'
        env:
          HEROKU_API_KEY: 
        run: |
          git remote add heroku https://heroku:$HEROKU_API_KEY@git.heroku.com/turma-de-elite.git
          git push heroku release:master

input:
sudo: false
language: java
cache:
  directories:
  - "$HOME/.cache"
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

after_success:
  - mvn clean test jacoco:report coveralls:report

deploy:
  provider: script
  script: "mvn deploy -Dmaven.test.skip=true --settings .travis.settings.xml"
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    branch: master

notifications:
  email:
    recipients:
      - gr-tig-oss@future.co.jp
    on_success: change # default: change
    on_failure: always # default: always
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cache-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-cache-
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn clean install
      - name: Generate coverage report
        run: mvn clean test jacoco:report coveralls:report
      - name: Deploy to repository
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master'
        run: mvn deploy -Dmaven.test.skip=true --settings .travis.settings.xml
      - name: Email notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          # TODO: Configure email notifications to gr-tig-oss@future.co.jp

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

sudo: true
dist: trusty

before_install:
  # Coverity token
  - echo -n | openssl s_client -connect scan.coverity.com:443 | sed -ne '/-BEGIN CERTIFICATE-/,/-END CERTIFICATE-/p' | sudo tee -a /etc/ssl/certs/ca-
   
  # Install zookeeper
  - mkdir /tmp/zookeeper
  - export ZK="apache-zookeeper-3.7.0-bin"
  - wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/zookeeper/zookeeper-3.7.0/$ZK.tar.gz
  - tar xzf $ZK.tar.gz -C /tmp/zookeeper
  - cp /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/conf/zoo_sample.cfg /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/conf/zoo.cfg
  - /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/bin/zkServer.sh start
  - cat /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/logs/*

  # Change config
  - sed -i "s/zookeepernodes:.*/zookeepernodes:\ ['localhost:2181']/" conf/bboxdb.yaml
  - echo "#####################################################################"
  - cat conf/bboxdb.yaml
  - echo "#####################################################################"
  # Create required directories
  - mkdir -p /tmp/bboxdb/data

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
  
cache:
  directories:
  - $HOME/.m2

name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache Maven repository
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-

    - name: Before install
      run: |
        echo -n | openssl s_client -connect scan.coverity.com:443 | sed -ne '/-BEGIN CERTIFICATE-/,/-END CERTIFICATE-/p' | sudo tee -a /etc/ssl/certs/ca-
        mkdir /tmp/zookeeper
        export ZK="apache-zookeeper-3.7.0-bin"
        wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/zookeeper/zookeeper-3.7.0/$ZK.tar.gz
        tar xzf $ZK.tar.gz -C /tmp/zookeeper
        cp /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/conf/zoo_sample.cfg /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/conf/zoo.cfg
        /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/bin/zkServer.sh start
        cat /tmp/zookeeper/$ZK/logs/*
        sed -i "s/zookeepernodes:.*/zookeepernodes:\ ['localhost:2181']/" conf/bboxdb.yaml
        echo "#####################################################################"
        cat conf/bboxdb.yaml
        echo "#####################################################################"
        mkdir -p /tmp/bboxdb/data

    - name: After success
      run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

input:
language: java

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

services:
  - docker

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
    - $HOME/libsodium

install:
  - ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
  - export PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH
  - export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

stages:
  - name: build
  - name: snapshot
    if: branch = dev
  - name: release
    if: branch = master

jobs:
  include:
    # run gradle build
    - stage: build
      script:
        - docker-compose up -d
        - ./gradlew integrationTest
        - ./gradlew build

    # publish snapshot to oss.jfrog.org
    - stage: snapshot
      script: ./gradlew artifactoryPublish -x test -Dsnapshot=true -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    # release a new stable version to bintray
    - stage: release
      script:
       - ./gradlew bintrayUpload -x test -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER
      before_deploy:
        - VERSION=`./gradlew -q pV`
        - TAG="v$VERSION"
        - git config --global user.name "Travis CI"
        - git config --global user.email "builds@travis-ci.com"
        - git tag $TAG
      deploy:
        provider: releases
        api_key:
          secure: $GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN
        body: "Please take a look into the [release notes](https://github.com/kryptokrauts/aepp-sdk-java/blob/${TAG}/docs/release-notes/RELEASE-NOTES-${VERSION}.md) for more information about the recent changes."
        skip_cleanup: true
        file_glob: true
        file:
          - build/libs/*.jar
        on: master
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          $HOME/libsodium
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-libsodium-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'travis-install-libsodium.sh') }}

    - name: Install
      run: |
        ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
        echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Build
      run: |
        docker-compose up -d
        ./gradlew integrationTest
        ./gradlew build

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  snapshot:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          $HOME/libsodium
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-libsodium-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'travis-install-libsodium.sh') }}

    - name: Install
      run: |
        ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
        echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Publish snapshot
      run: ./gradlew artifactoryPublish -x test -Dsnapshot=true -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  release:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          $HOME/libsodium
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-libsodium-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'travis-install-libsodium.sh') }}

    - name: Install
      run: |
        ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
        echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Release build
      run: ./gradlew bintrayUpload -x test -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Compute tag
      id: vars
      run: |
        VERSION=$(./gradlew -q pV)
        echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        echo "tag=v$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

    - name: Configure git and tag
      run: |
        git config --global user.name "Travis CI"
        git config --global user.email "builds@travis-ci.com"
        git tag ${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}

    - name: Create release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}
        release_name: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}
        body: "Please take a look into the [release notes](https://github.com/kryptokrauts/aepp-sdk-java/blob/${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}/docs/release-notes/RELEASE-NOTES-${{ steps.vars.outputs.version }}.md) for more information about the recent changes."
        draft: false
        prerelease: false

    - name: Upload release assets
      uses: actions/upload-release-asset@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
      with:
        upload_url: ${{ steps.create-release.outputs.upload_url }}
        asset_path: build/libs/
        asset_name: "*.jar"
        asset_content_type: application/java-archive

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

jobs:
  include:
    - name: jdk11
      jdk: openjdk11
      script: ./gradlew check -i

    - name: example
      jdk: openjdk11
      before_install: |
        if .travis/build_condition.sh $TRAVIS_COMMIT_RANGE examples/example; then
          echo "Testing";
        else
          echo "NOT testing" && travis_terminate 0;
        fi
      script:
        - cd ./examples/example/
        - ./gradlew check -i
        - cd ../..

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

branches:
  only: 
    - master
output:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  jdk11:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run check
        run: ./gradlew check -i
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  example:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Check if testing is needed
        id: check
        run: |
          if .travis/build_condition.sh ${{ github.event.before }}..${{ github.sha }} examples/example; then
            echo "Testing"
            echo "skip=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "NOT testing"
            echo "skip=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      - name: Run example check
        if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
        run: |
          cd ./examples/example/
          ./gradlew check -i
          cd ../..
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.

- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source (Buildx, login actions, GHCR, Sonar, custom email actions). If no 1:1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:" comment.
- Prefer compact flow style for simple event lists. Use on: [push, pull_request] instead of multiline empty mappings.

dist: trusty

before_cache:
- rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vlingo
cache:
  directories:
  - "$HOME/.m2/repository"
deploy:
  - provider: script
    script: mvn deploy -DskipTests
    skip_cleanup: true
    on:
      tags: true
  - provider: script
    script: mvn deploy -DskipTests
    skip_cleanup: true
    on:
      branch: master
  - key:
    secure: 
after_deploy:
- chmod u+x .travis/trigger_deps.sh

output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Cache Maven repository
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2/repository
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-

    - name: Before install
      run: |
        rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vlingo
        cp .travis/settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
        mvn deploy:help versions:help help:help

    - name: Build
      run: mvn install -PTravisCI

    - name: Deploy (tag)
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      run: mvn deploy -DskipTests

    - name: Deploy (master branch)
      if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: mvn deploy -DskipTests

    - name: After deploy (tag)
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      run: |
        chmod u+x .travis/trigger_deps.sh
        .travis/trigger_deps.sh

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vlingo

input:
sudo: required
services:
  - docker
  - postgresql
language: java
jdk: oraclejdk8
before_script:
  - curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
  - chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
  - ./cc-test-reporter before-build
  - psql -c 'create database events;' -U postgres
script:
  - "./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport jacocoFix -PbuildNumber=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER --scan"
  - docker build --no-cache --pull -t wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER .
after_success:
  - if [ "${TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST_BRANCH:-$TRAVIS_BRANCH}" == "master" ]; then
    docker login -u="$DOCKER_USERNAME" -p="$DOCKER_PASSWORD";
    docker push wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER;
    fi
after_script:
  - cd src/main/java/
  - ../../../cc-test-reporter format-coverage -d -t jacoco
  - ../../../cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -d
notifications:
  slack: false
  email: false
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:13
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: postgres
          POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD: trust
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="pg_isready -U postgres"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Code Climate before build
      run: |
        curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
        chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
        ./cc-test-reporter before-build

    - name: Create database
      run: psql -c 'create database events;' -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1

    - name: Build and Docker image
      run: |
        ./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport jacocoFix -PbuildNumber=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER --scan
        docker build --no-cache --pull -t wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER .

    - name: Push Docker image on master
      if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: |
        echo "$DOCKER_USERNAME" | sed 's/./*/g'
        echo "$DOCKER_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_USERNAME" --password-stdin
        docker push wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Code Climate after build
      run: |
        cd src/main/java/
        ../../../cc-test-reporter format-coverage -d -t jacoco
        ../../../cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -d
